name: mirofish
description: MiroFishES - a bounded forecasting and simulation workbench with explicit evidence limits

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.backend: cd backend && FLASK_HOST=127.0.0.1 uv run python run.py
scripts.verify:backend: sh -c 'if [ -d backend/tests ] && find backend/tests -type f -name "*.py" -print -quit | grep -q .; then if [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ]; then cd backend && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests -q; else cd backend && python3 -m pytest tests -q; fi; else echo "No backend tests under backend/tests; skipping backend verification."; fi'
scripts.verify:nonbinary:backend: sh -c 'cd backend && python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_forecasting_schema.py tests/unit/test_forecast_manager.py tests/unit/test_forecast_api.py tests/unit/test_forecast_engine.py tests/unit/test_hybrid_forecast_service.py tests/unit/test_probabilistic_report_context.py tests/unit/test_probabilistic_report_api.py -q'
scripts.verify:nonbinary: npm run verify:nonbinary:backend && npm run verify:nonbinary:frontend
scripts.verify:confidence: sh -c 'cd backend && python3 -m pytest tests/unit/test_probabilistic_schema.py tests/unit/test_backtest_manager.py tests/unit/test_calibration_manager.py tests/unit/test_probabilistic_report_context.py tests/unit/test_probabilistic_report_api.py tests/unit/test_probabilistic_prepare.py tests/unit/test_build_confidence_artifacts_script.py tests/unit/test_forecast_engine.py tests/unit/test_hybrid_forecast_service.py -q' && node --test frontend/tests/unit/probabilisticRuntime.test.mjs frontend/tests/unit/forecastRuntime.test.mjs
scripts.verify:forecasting:artifacts: sh -c 'if [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ]; then backend/.venv/bin/python backend/scripts/scan_forecasting_artifacts.py --simulation-data-dir backend/uploads/simulations; else python3 backend/scripts/scan_forecasting_artifacts.py --simulation-data-dir backend/uploads/simulations; fi'
scripts.verify:forecasting:artifacts:all: sh -c 'if [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ]; then backend/.venv/bin/python backend/scripts/scan_forecasting_artifacts.py --simulation-data-dir backend/uploads/simulations --include-archived; else python3 backend/scripts/scan_forecasting_artifacts.py --simulation-data-dir backend/uploads/simulations --include-archived; fi'
scripts.forecasting:archive:historical: sh -c 'if [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ]; then backend/.venv/bin/python backend/scripts/archive_nonconforming_forecasting_artifacts.py --simulation-data-dir backend/uploads/simulations --apply; else python3 backend/scripts/archive_nonconforming_forecasting_artifacts.py --simulation-data-dir backend/uploads/simulations --apply; fi'
scripts.forecasting:migrate:historical: sh -c 'if [ -x backend/.venv/bin/python ]; then backend/.venv/bin/python backend/scripts/migrate_historical_forecasting_artifacts.py --simulation-data-dir backend/uploads/simulations --apply; else python3 backend/scripts/migrate_historical_forecasting_artifacts.py --simulation-data-dir backend/uploads/simulations --apply; fi'
scripts.verify: npm run verify:frontend && npm run verify:backend
